plugin.name: Credential Scanner
plugin.description: Sweep a folder for likely exposed secrets and write a plaintext report when matches are found.
title: Credential Scanner
description: A fast static scan for common secret patterns. It skips obvious binary formats and writes a report beside the scanned folder.
summary.initial: Choose a folder to start a security sweep.
summary.done: Scanned {count} files and found {matches} potential matches.
match.label: Match Detected
error.no_files: No files found in the selected folder.
dialog.missing.title: Missing Input
